title: My first day in Paris
summary: A tourist arrives in Paris for the first time and describes the sights, sounds, and a small misunderstanding at a café.
body: Yesterday I arrived in Paris. The airport was very busy. I took a taxi to my hotel near the river. In the afternoon, I went to a small café. The waiter smiled at me. I tried to order in French but he didn't understand. He laughed and we both used English. At night, I walked along the river. The lights on the bridges were beautiful.

grammarNotes.title: Past simple
grammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'past simple' cho các hành động đã hoàn thành trong quá khứ tại một thời điểm cụ thể.
grammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the past simple for completed actions at a specific time in the past. e.g. 'I arrived', 'I took', 'I went'.

translationVi: Hôm qua tôi đến Paris. Sân bay rất đông. Tôi đi taxi đến khách sạn gần sông. Buổi chiều tôi đến một quán cà phê nhỏ. Người phục vụ mỉm cười. Tôi cố gọi món bằng tiếng Pháp nhưng anh ấy không hiểu. Anh ấy cười và chúng tôi dùng tiếng Anh. Buổi tối tôi đi dạo dọc sông. Đèn trên các cây cầu rất đẹp.

questions.explanation: The first sentence states 'I arrived in Paris.'

questions.prompt: How did the writer travel to the hotel?
questions.explanation: 'I took a taxi to my hotel.'

questions.prompt: What did the waiter do first?
questions.hint: What is the first thing the waiter is described as doing?

questions.prompt: Why didn't the order in French work?
options: The writer used the wrong word
questions.hint: Look at the result of the order.

questions.prompt: What language did they finally use?
When did the writer walk along the river?
questions.explanation: 'At night, I walked along the river.'

questions.prompt: What did the writer find beautiful?
questions.explanation: 'The lights on the bridges were beautiful.'

questions.prompt: Which tense is mostly used in this passage?
questions.explanation: Past simple — completed past actions like 'arrived', 'took', 'went'.

questions.prompt: Which best describes the writer's day?
questions.explanation: The passage describes arriving, a friendly mishap at a café, and an enjoyable walk — a mix of new experiences.

cloze.template: Yesterday I {{b1}} in Paris. The airport was {{b2}}. I took a {{b3}} to my hotel near the {{b4}}. At night, the lights on the bridges were {{b5}}.

blanks.explanation: Past simple for a completed action in the past.
The passage says the airport was very busy.
The passage says: 'I took a taxi to my hotel.'
The passage says the hotel was near the river.
The passage says the lights on the bridges were beautiful.
